description: A fine-tuned LLM drafts Module 3 regulatory submission sections; outputs flow into the submission dossier (a GxP record). A human reviews but does not check every citation. The model is periodically retrained on new submissions. Data: GxP records.
A locked, configured ML classifier flags out-of-spec results in QC; a human reviews and approves each flag before any batch decision; outputs are recorded in the QMS. Data: GxP records.
A continuously-learning predictive-maintenance model forecasts equipment failure on a non-GxP utility system; advisory only; no GxP records affected. Data: internal non-GxP.
A fine-tuned LLM automatically generates batch-release recommendations that act on GxP records without mandatory human review. Locked model. Data: GxP records.
An off-the-shelf LLM triages incoming deviations and suggests a category; advisory; outputs are NOT entered into GxP records (informal use); could influence quality judgment. Locked. Data: internal.
An off-the-shelf LLM answers employee questions about SOPs (a knowledge assistant). No patient-safety/product-quality/data-integrity impact; no GxP records; advisory. Locked. Data: internal.
A custom-built demand-forecasting model for commercial supply planning; no GxP impact; no GxP records; locked. Data: public/aggregate.

A custom computer-vision model performs automated visual inspection of filled vials and automatically rejects units, acting on GxP batch records without per-unit human review. Locked. Data: GxP records.

A fine-tuned, continuously-learning ML model predicts dosing for clinical decision support; a clinician reviews each recommendation; outputs are not auto-entered into GxP records but influence patient safety. Data: personal/PHI.
A configured LLM drafts CAPA records that are entered into the QMS after advisory human review; affects product quality/data integrity. Locked. Data: GxP records.
A rule-based (non-AI/deterministic) automation bot transfers values between systems and writes to GxP records automatically; no ML model. Data: GxP records.
An off-the-shelf LLM summarizes published scientific literature for a research team; no GxP impact; no GxP records; advisory; locked. Data: public.

An agentic AI tool auto-generates and executes computer-system-validation (CSV) protocols; it uses tools to pull system information and writes results into the validation record; a validation lead reviews and approves. Configured LLM, agentic, locked. Data: GxP records.

An agentic LLM continuously scans public FDA enforcement actions, warning letters, and guidance to flag supplier risk and inspection-readiness gaps; advisory; outputs inform quality decisions but are not auto-entered into GxP records. Data: public/external.

A custom, continuously-learning agentic AI autonomously adjusts critical process parameters on the live manufacturing line in real time, using tools to act on the MES without per-action human review ('self-healing'). Data: GxP records.
Soft-sensor predicts product potency in continuous manufacturing; advisory to operators. Build: custom predictive; data: gxp_records.
Multivariate statistical process control flags batch excursions; human reviews. Build: configured ml; data: gxp_records.
Advanced process control autonomously adjusts a non-critical utility loop. Build: custom ml; data: internal.
LLM converts master batch records into electronic batch records; QA approves. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Agentic assistant drafts a deviation investigation and pulls prior cases via tools. Build: cots llm (agentic/tool-using); data: internal.
Pharmacovigilance signal-detection ML over adverse-event data; advisory. Build: configured ml; data: personal_phi.
LLM auto-codes ICSR adverse events into the safety database automatically. Build: finetuned llm; data: personal_phi.
Vision model detects particulates in vials; flags for human inspector. Build: custom ml; data: gxp_records.
Agentic vision system auto-rejects vials and updates MES with no human review. Build: custom ml (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
LLM chatbot answers GMP training questions for operators; advisory. Build: cots llm; data: internal.
OCR+LLM extracts CoA values from supplier PDFs into LIMS automatically. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
LLM drafts SOP revisions for author review; not entered until approved. Build: cots llm; data: internal.
Agentic tool monitors public FDA enforcement to score supplier risk; advisory. Build: cots llm (agentic/tool-using); data: public.
Predictive maintenance ML on GMP autoclaves writes work orders to the CMMS. Build: cots predictive; data: gxp_records.
LLM summarizes stability data into a report section; statistician reviews. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Generative model designs DoE experiments for process development; advisory. Build: finetuned llm; data: internal.
Agentic LLM orchestrates sub-agents to assemble an IND module, auto-submits draft. Build: finetuned llm (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
ML classifies environmental-monitoring excursions; microbiologist approves. Build: configured ml; data: gxp_records.
LLM triages complaints and proposes severity; auto-files into complaint system. Build: cots llm; data: gxp_records.
Demand-forecasting ML for commercial planning; no GxP impact. Build: cots predictive; data: public.
Agentic CSV tool generates and executes IQ/OQ protocols into the validation record. Build: finetuned llm (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
LLM cleaning-validation calculator; QA verifies every result. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Continuously-learning model optimizes lyophilization cycle in real time, acts on PLC. Build: custom ml (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
LLM drafts annual product review narrative; QA reviews before use. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Knowledge assistant over public guidance documents; advisory, no records. Build: cots llm; data: public.
ML predicts dissolution from process params; advisory to formulators. Build: finetuned ml; data: internal.
Agentic batch-release assistant checks the record and recommends disposition; QP signs. Build: finetuned llm (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
Generative tool writes marketing copy (non-GxP). Build: cots llm; data: public.
LLM extracts and reconciles values across an executed batch record; QA reviews flags. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Adaptive APC adjusts critical process parameters with operator confirmation each change. Build: custom ml; data: gxp_records.
Agentic data-integrity auditor scans audit trails and opens deviations automatically. Build: configured llm (agentic/tool-using); data: gxp_records.
LLM translates a regulatory dossier between languages; human verifies. Build: cots llm; data: gxp_records.
ML supplier-risk scoring from internal quality history; advisory. Build: configured ml; data: internal.
Locked LLM drafts CAPA effectiveness checks; QA approves and records. Build: configured llm; data: gxp_records.
Research literature-mining agent for discovery scientists; non-GxP. Build: cots llm (agentic/tool-using); data: public.
